dataset: LIDC-IDRI (Lung Image Database Consortium and Infectious Disease Research Institute)

pi_items.source: https://www.radiologycafe.com, https://www.litfl.com, https://github.io (Miguel A. Lerma's LIDC-IDRI reference)

privileged_info_summary: Standard CT window level settings for the LIDC-IDRI dataset and clinical practice are: Lung (W: 1500-2000, L: -600 to -500), Soft Tissue (W: 350-400, L: 40-50), and Bone (W: 1800-2000, L: 300-500).
